name: IRC_IS_INTRVW_REQUESTS
description: This table stores all the interview requests done to the candidate as well store other information like counts

columns.Name: INTRVW_REQUESTS_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key for this table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the submissions (IRC_SUBMISSIONS) to which we are linking the interview request

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the schedules (IRC_IS_SCHEDULES_B) to which we are linking the interview request

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the interviews (IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS) to which we are linking the interview request

columns.Name: IS_RSCHLD_RQSTED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag used when reschedule is requested to the candidate, count will not be incremented. (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: INTRVW_RSCHLD_COUNT
columns.Comments: Holds the count for the reschedules because it can exceed setting value, default is 0

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUTO_O365_IS_OVERRIDDEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag used when the interviewers are overridden.

columns.Name: AUTO_O365_OVERRIDDEN_DURATION
columns.Comments: Determine the overridden interview meeting slot duration. Lookup to use ORA_IRC_IS_MEETING_DURATION.

columns.Name: IS_RESCHEDULED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determine if the Interview Request has been rescheduled.

columns.Name: EARLIEST_AVAILABLE_DATE
columns.Comments: Manual and proposed slots will be shown starting from this timestamp.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_REQUEST_CONFIG
columns.Comments: Contains feedback request configuration to be created.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_LOCATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_TYPE.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_MEETING_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS.INTERVIEW_MEETING_PROVIDER.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_VISBLTY_RANGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_SCHEDULES_B.INTERVWS_VISIBILITY_RANGE_CODE.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_CONFERENCE_LINK
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.WEB_CONFERENCE_LINK.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_PHONE_PASSCODE
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.PHONE_NUMBER_PASSCODE.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_PH_COUNTRY_CODE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to a phone country code. (HZ_PHONE_COUNTRY_CODES)

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_PHONE_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE_NUMBER.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_PHONE_AREA
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.PHONE_AREA_CODE.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.PHONE_NUMBER.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_PHONE_EXTENSION
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.PHONE_EXT.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID.

columns.Name: OVERRIDDEN_LOCATION_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Overrides IRC_IS_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_DETAILS.
